refnamediv.refpurpose: Apply native binary morphology to a 3-D volume.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imbwmorph3(volume, operation) out = imbwmorph3(volume, operation, iterations, connectivity)

listitem.para: Binary or numeric 3-D volume. Nonzero voxels are foreground.
Positive number of repetitions. Default is 1.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Performs volumetric erosion, dilation, opening, or closing in native C++. Connectivity selects face, face-and-edge, or full 3-by-3-by-3 neighborhoods.

refsection.title: Examples
